reviews.review_description: This game does have the hologram avatar stuff. The controls are almost impossible besides picking the song. But if I start it up the avatars seems to just dance for you which makes it easy and it does sound sleezy from the name title but it has a couple male and female that dance together like at a night club.

reviews.review_title: A Disco in your living room
reviews.review_description: The game is cool and fun to play around with, I like to watch the dancers on the stage and it is nice to be able to resize the dancers.
It is really awesome app, it feels like you are having real dancers next to you in your house ;) If you want to have 3 dancers at once use the itch version, this one only has one at a time.
The game is so cool it has realistic models and even has a confetti Grenade you can resize the models and the stage you can make them so small they can fit on your desk the game is so good 10/10
Really feels like you are having a show inside your house and you can interact, it feels so real as you can touch the dancers with the hands, not only controllers!
